executives.name: Edie Hofmeister
executives.background: Ms. Hofmeister is an attorney with over 25 years of experience in legal and ESG matters in the mining industry.

executives.name: Frédéric Ruel
executives.background: Mr. Ruel has over 20 years of experience in financial reporting and the mining industry. He has been with Osisko since its inception in 2014.

executives.name: Heather Taylor
executives.background: Ms. Taylor has extensive experience in investor relations and corporate communications within the resource sector.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President, Sustainability and Communications (formerly Vice President, Investor Relations)

executives.name: Joanne Ferstman
executives.background: Ms. Ferstman is a corporate director with over 20 years of experience in the financial services sector.

executives.name: Penny Westman
executives.background: Ms. Westman is a lawyer with over 35 years of experience in the mining industry, including senior roles at Barrick Gold Corporation.

executives.name: Pierre-Sébastien Thivierge
executives.background: Mr. Thivierge is a lawyer and has held various senior positions in the mining industry and legal practice.

executives.name: Elif Lévesque
executives.background: Ms. Lévesque is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 20 years of experience in finance and the mining industry. She was a founder of Nomad Royalty Company.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Financial Officer and Vice President, Finance

executives.name: Jason Attew
executives.background: Mr. Attew is a mining industry executive with over 25 years of experience in investment banking and corporate strategy. He was previously CFO of Goldcorp Inc.

tenure_dates.title: President, Chief Executive Officer, and Director
